name: Knock You Nakeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, chopped nuts, and 1/3 cup of evaporated milk with melted butter in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Press half of this mixture into the bottom of a greased 13 x 9-inch Pyrex dish.
3. Bake at 350°F for 8 minutes.
4. Melt caramel candies in a double boiler with 1/2 cup of evaporated milk until the mixture is well combined.
5. Pour the melted caramel mixture over the baked cake layer.
6. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the top, then pour the remaining cake batter on top of the chocolate chips.
7. Bake for an additional 18 minutes at 350°F.
8. Allow to cool before slicing.
